headline: Nasdaq, US stocks slide as Fed forecasts possible rate hike
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) ended Wednesday's session in negative territory after Federal Reserve officials unanimously voted to hold interest rates at their June FOMC meeting today, while also forecasting at least one possible rate hike ahead. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre breaks down the trading day's market reactions to the Fed's big decision. This was Kevin Warsh's first FOMC meeting he presided over as the new chairman of the Fed.

headline: CrowdStrike Advances AI and Cloud Security Operations on AWS
summary: AUSTIN, Texas & NEW YORK, June 17, 2026--AWS Summit New York -- CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD), in collaboration with Amazon Web Services (AWS), today announced new AI, cloud, and Next-Gen SIEM innovations that help organizations securely build, deploy, and operate AI applications and cloud workloads on AWS.

headline: CrowdStrike Expands Project QuiltWorks with AWS, Hardening the Cloud Attack Surface Against Frontier AI Risk
summary: AUSTIN, Texas & NEW YORK, June 17, 2026--AWS Summit New York – CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced that it is expanding Project QuiltWorks with Amazon Web Services (AWS), extending the coalition from the technology, services, and financial protection to mitigate frontier AI risk, to the attack surface where vulnerabilities live and are exploited. As frontier AI collapses the window between vulnerability and exploitation – marking a significant inflection point in cybersecurity history – Q

headline: Sanjay Poonen, Cohesity CEO: A Fortt Knox Update
summary: Cohesity CEO Sanjay Poonen told Jon Fortt the company is launching Maestro, a headless architecture that lets Cohesity's cyber-resilience capabilities be invoked by any agent orchestrator: Claude, ChatGPT, or enterprise platforms. Poonen called it the next step after Cohesity Copilot and the recovery agent, riffing on Ben Franklin to argue an ounce of resilience equals a pound of detection as attackers use agentic AI to compress attack timelines.

raw.headline: Sanjay Poonen, Cohesity CEO: A Fortt Knox Update

Poonen called it the next step after Cohesity Copilot and the recovery agent, riffing on Ben Franklin to argue an ounce of resilience equals a pound of detection as attackers use agentic AI to compress attack timelines.
